ShortDescription.Value: Scale Public Transit, Passengers, Industry Cargo + Delivery, Road + Parks vehicles, and increase Transit Line slider limits.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Public Works Plus (PWP)
Scale **fleet sizes**, **vehicle capacities** in: all Public Transit, Parks/Roads Maintenance, All Industry Deliveries, Cargo stations, Extractors.
### Features - NEW **Industry Deliveries**: scale cargo capacity for delivery vehicles (Semi trucks, Delivery vans, Motorbike delivery, Raw materials trucks - coal, oil, etc.) - NEW **Extractor companies**: Fish, Grain, etc.; scale max fleet size (usually semi trucks) - NEW **Cargo Stations**: scale max fleet of cargo stations (harbor/train/airport) - NEW: **Transit Line Slider** (when you only want 1 bus or need ~30-60 buses). - NEW **Parks + Roads maintenance**: fleet size, work shift, and rate (alpha) - NEW **Road wear speed** (alpha): scale how fast or slow roads accumulate wear (damage) over time - **Transit depots**: change max vehicles per depot (Bus, Ferry, Subway, Taxi, Tram, Train) - **Passengers**: change seats per vehicle (Bus, Tram, Train, Subway, Ship, Ferry, Airplane)
### Notes 🚍🚋🚆✈️🚢 - Remove "Adjust Transit Capacity" mod; it's already included in this mod. - **Adjust Sliders** at any time, no restart needed; Supports switching cities. - Transit lines: follows the game’s **route cycle time** (travel time + stops) formula; math is tweaked so you can have just 1 bus per line or ~30-60buses. PwP is made differently than older policy adjusters; no Harmony patch is used and max is not static so it will not be 250 buses on one line. You still get tons of buses. - Depot capacity = maximum number of vehicles a single depot can maintain/spawn (does not scale extension buildings). - **Avoid** other depot/passenger capacity mods to avoid conflicts (they override each other). - No Harmony or Reflection; more compatible - less likely to break with game updates. - Safe to remove any time (use Reset buttons to return to vanilla game default values). - ✅ Transit Line toggle: it's your choice if you want to use this built-in one. Pick one, don't use other mods that also adjust the in-game slider (e.g. Transport Policy Adjuster). If both are enabled, it's not going to explode, it may be inconsistent like two people changing the radio station.
### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - This mod is 5-6 new mods combined; feedback was to combine more features into a single mod. Therefore, not all details are above as it's already long, but might be answered in forums. - For questions, try Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi: author - yenyang: code review and testing. - The Transit section is inspired by Wayz's original Depot Capacity Changer. - Necko1996: testing - BugsyG: testing
### Performance advantage: this is designed to *not* run in the city per-frame. Player makes changes in Options Menu > then mod goes idle. Debug tools are off by default.
### 11 Languages
- English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski Polish, Português Brazilian - 한국어, 日本語, 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese), 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
### Tip: If you want to increase maximum of the transit route slider a little more, add some stops to the route. Game auto-increases the max based on different factors, adding stops is just the easiest to nudge.
tags: city dispatch, transit line increase, control municipal, public transit system, change size, increase people passengers, depot size demand, decrease passengers, delivery trucks vans, industry semi-trucks, cargo station depot capacity, Extractor, fish
